name: quereus-workspace
description: Quereus monorepo - Pure TypeScript SQL engine with CRDT sync. No WASM, no native bindings.

scripts.check: yarn docs:check && yarn lint && yarn build && yarn test:full && yarn test:fork-strict && yarn test:context-strict
scripts.release: node scripts/release-guard.js && yarn bump && yarn pub && yarn gh-release
scripts.//build: tsc -b compiles all pure-tsc library packages (class A) in dependency order via project references (see tsconfig.build.json). The three bundled apps below emit via vite/esbuild, so they run after the graph: shared-ui (build:ui) before quoomb-web (build:web) since web consumes shared-ui's dist; vscode is independent. Per-package build:* scripts are kept so other scripts/docs that call them still work.
scripts.build: yarn clean && tsc -b tsconfig.build.json && yarn build:ui && yarn build:vscode && yarn build:web
scripts.lint: yarn workspaces foreach -A --exclude quereus-workspace run lint
scripts.test: yarn workspaces foreach -A --exclude quereus-workspace run test
scripts.test:all: yarn workspaces foreach -A --exclude quereus-workspace run test:all
scripts.dep-check: yarn workspaces foreach -A --exclude quereus-workspace run dep-check
scripts.doc: yarn workspaces foreach -A --exclude quereus-workspace run doc
scripts.typecheck: yarn workspaces foreach -A --exclude quereus-workspace run typecheck
scripts.dev:cli-built: cd packages/quoomb-cli && yarn build && node dist/bin/quoomb.js
scripts.//pub: NOTE: this publish order is still hand-maintained and is NO LONGER kept in lockstep with the build order — `build` now derives its order from tsconfig references (tsc -b), so adding/reordering a package updates the build automatically but NOT this chain. Keep this list in dependency order (a package must publish after everything it depends on) by hand; if you add a package to tsconfig.build.json, add its pub:* step here too.
scripts.pub: yarn pub:quereus && yarn pub:loader && yarn pub:isolation && yarn pub:store && yarn pub:plugin-indexeddb && yarn pub:plugin-leveldb && yarn pub:plugin-rn && yarn pub:plugin-ns && yarn pub:sync && yarn pub:sync-client && yarn pub:sync-coordinator && yarn pub:ui && yarn pub:cli && yarn pub:planviz
